metaTitle: The Boeing Atmosphere Global Documentation Hub - Get started

header.title: Get started
header.description: Get to know Atmosphere - from UX guidance and tools to reusable components and open-source code.

sections.text:
What's Atmosphere?

Atmosphere is a design system built and supported by Boeing designers and developers. The library includes in-depth UX guidance and UI component implementations with Angular Material.

Atmosphere is organized in four main parts: foundations,  styles, components, and patterns. Each section includes design guidance and tools to help you build with the design system.

items.text:
Foundations

Learn about the basics behind Atmosphere, from design principles to layout and content guidance.

Styles

Explore UI visual treatment and guidelines across Atmosphere's color system, shape & radius, typography and iconography.

Components

Get detailed documentation about Atmosphere's components, including use cases, functionality, and specifications.

Patterns

Combine components to create patterns, which standardize common actions across the Boeing product ecosystem.

sections.text:
Design

Design UI kit, templates and downloads to help you get started in Figma crafting screens and interfaces that align with the Boeing brand language.

items.text:
Atmosphere Foundations and Components Library

A Figma UI toolkit designers can use to get started creating digital products with Atmosphere's design system.

Atmosphere Icons Library

A Figma library that holds Atmosphere's icons. Make sure to enable this library in your files in order to get access to different icons.

Downloads

Get access to Boeing's Meso font family and other branding assets.

sections.text:
Develop

The latest Boeing components, updates, and documentation to help you begin building products and ensure your resources are up-to-date.

items.text:
Developer documentation

Get started with contributing to or using Atmosphere in your product.

GitLab: Global Assets Library

A framework-independent toolkit for implementing Atmosphere in your project.

GitLab: Global Angular Library

An Angular implementation of Atmosphere.

Storybook: Global Angular Library

Explore the Atmosphere's Angular components.

Report a bug

Contact our team with any bug issues encountered throughout the code or components library.

New component request

Submit requests for new or modified components that build on Atmosphere's current Figma library.

How to contribute

Connect with our team in order to collaborate on future projects.

Meet the team

Learn more about the team behind Atmosphere.
